methods.description: A statistical regression model was built to simulate and predict the SPIn and pollen exposure at 28 pollen-monitoring stations in Northwest Europe. The model considers preseasonal meteorological conditions to forecast the severity of the forthcoming grass pollen season.

steps.description: Collect SPIn and pollen exposure data from 28 pollen-monitoring stations.
steps.searchable_summary: gather SPIn and pollen exposure data from monitoring stations

steps.description: Calculate correlation coefficients between individual sites in relation to seasonal severity (SPIn).
steps.searchable_summary: compute correlation coefficients for SPIn between sites

steps.description: Build a statistical regression model using preseasonal meteorological conditions and SPIn data.
steps.searchable_summary: develop regression model with meteorological and SPIn data

steps.description: Test the regression model to identify the number of years providing the best correlation between modeled and observed SPIn data.
steps.searchable_summary: validate regression model with historical SPIn data

methods.description: A mechanistic model was used to study interannual variations in grass SPIn through variations in NPP in grasslands with C3 grasses. The JULES model was employed to simulate NPP for grasses over 407 pollen seasons.

steps.description: Use the JULES model to simulate NPP for grasses at selected stations for the years 1996 to 2016.
steps.searchable_summary: simulate NPP using JULES model for selected stations

steps.description: Compare NPP and SPIn interannual variations for all sites to find associations.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze correlation between NPP and SPIn variations

steps.description: Perform sensitivity model runs to study the influence of doubled atmospheric CO2 concentration on NPP values.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct sensitivity analysis on NPP with doubled CO2

methods.description: Collection of pollen and meteorological data from 34 observation stations in Northwest Europe for the study period 1996-2018.

steps.description: Select 34 pollen observation stations in Northwest Europe and collect daily mean grass pollen concentrations.
steps.searchable_summary: collect daily grass pollen data from observation stations

steps.description: Obtain meteorological data from the GSOD dataset for preseason conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch meteorological data from GSOD for preseason
